experiments.name: Preview hero CTA routes to signup (not chat)
experiments.hypothesis: The primary 'Start tracking investors — free' hero CTA on the preview previously opened the Peter intro chat panel via handleGate('intro') — firing match_intro_requested but never founder_signup_started and never routing to /signup/founder. With 27 previews and 0 founder_signup_started over 7d, the most prominent benefit-CTA was a label→destination mismatch. Repointing it to handleGate('save') (routes to /signup/founder, fires founder_signup_started) plus a locked-count cliffhanger subline should move preview→signup off 0%. Peter/intro stays reachable via per-match, explain-inline, and sticky 'Ask Peter' buttons.

schema.cliffhanger_subline: top N unlocked + M more open up

copy.subline: Free account · your top {shown} stay unlocked and {locked} more open up.

experiments.promotion_note: Shipped 2026-07-17 — hero routes to signup. Superseded by founder_preview_primary_cta for unified outcome copy.

experiments.name: Single primary outcome CTA on preview
experiments.hypothesis: Preview had 6+ competing green CTAs (hero signup, Peter sticky primary, intro row, save/export row). Collapsing to ONE outcome-first primary ('See your top N signal-fit investors — free') with Peter/export as text links should lift founder_signup_started without killing match_intro_requested (intro demoted, not removed).

copy.primary: See your top {shown} signal-fit investors — free
copy.value_line: Activate Pythh to build your investor pipeline

experiments.name: Preview Oracle GOD-gap cliffhanger
experiments.hypothesis: Surfacing a locked Oracle GOD-gap (+N pts unlocks M investors) on the preview converts more signups than utility-only gates, and routes to /wizard after account creation.

copy.headline: GOD {god_score} — +{god_points} unlocks ~{investors_unlocked} investors
copy.picky: Partners screening you: {component} signal is the top gap Oracle flagged.
copy.cta: See your gap map — free account
copy.footer: Free account unlocks the full gap map and locked outreach preview in the wizard.

experiments.promotion_note: Shipped 2026-06-25 — Oracle gap teaser + nurture email with trial CTA.

experiments.name: Preview cliffhanger × signal-delta gate
experiments.hypothesis: A locked signal-delta teaser on the action_gate (matches shifted thesis-fit this week) converts more previewers to signup than utility-only gates (save/intro/export), and seeds a return trigger.

copy.picky: We screened {match_count} investors; {moved_toward_count} changed thesis-fit toward you this week and {moved_away_count} cooled.
copy.headline: Your matches moved this week.
copy.cta: See which moved — create a free account
copy.footer: Free account unlocks the full delta, the why, and the warm intro before the window closes.

experiments.promotion_note: Running 2026-06-24 — preview_delta_teaser_viewed wired; real deltas only (null when no movement).

experiments.name: Founder hero entry
experiments.hypothesis: URL-first hero converts better than email-first for founders who already have a site.

experiments.hypothesis: Benefit-led gate CTAs convert better than neutral action labels after the free shortlist reveal.

experiments.hypothesis: Short investor intake (firm + thesis) beats long multi-step for qualified leads.

experiments.name: Inline intro CTA inside match-explain evidence
experiments.hypothesis: Placing the intro CTA at the END of the 'Why this investor' evidence bullets — the moment of peak conviction — converts more explain-readers to intro intent than the separate right-column intro button, which drew 9 explain reads and 0 intros over 7d.

copy.cta: Ask for a warm intro to {first_name} →
copy.footer: Free — Peter drafts it from the evidence above.

experiments.promotion_note: DRAFT 2026-07-16 — shipped in site/ (report-only). Promote to running once match_explain_intro_clicked / match_explain_viewed > 8% over 7d and match_intro_requested moves off 0.

experiments.name: Oracle pricing page CTA
experiments.hypothesis: Trial-first CTA ('Start 7-day free trial') converts better than value-first ('Automate your pipeline') on /pricing.

copy.headline: Automate your investor pipeline
